zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice de Tichesey於1253年出生在英國素瑞迪千時，她的父親John de Tichesey28歲，母親Alice de Bohun24歲。她於1270年與Peter Atte Wode在英國英格蘭素瑞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1313年在英國倫敦享年60歲，埋葬在英國倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice de Tichesey was born in 1253, in Titsey, Surrey, England, her father, John de Tichesey, was 28 and her mother, Alice de Bohun, was 24. She married Peter Atte Wode in 1270, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1313, in London, England, at the age of 60, and was buried in London, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice de Tichesey est née en 1253, à Titsey, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, John de Tichesey, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Alice de Bohun, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Peter Atte Wode en 1270, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1313, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice de Tichesey 1253 in Titsey, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Tichesey 28 und ihre Mutter Alice de Bohun 24. Sie hat 1270 in Surrey, England, United Kingdom Peter Atte Wode geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1313 im Alter von 60 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London, England begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice de Tichesey(이)가 1253년 영국 수리 티츠이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Tichesey(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de Bohun(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1270년 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 Peter Atte Wode(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1313년 영국 런던에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 런던에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice de Tichesey родилась в 1253 г. в местности тици, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Tichesey было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de Bohun, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Atte Wode в 1270 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1313 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 60 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, Англия.
